title: reserve() correctly gates on zero availability
One uncovered line keeps coverage at 0.99
evidence: scores.json test_coverage=0.99; likely the final `return None` guard in catalog/reservations.py:54 (fulfill_next no-reservation path) is unexercised — return_book is only tested with a pending reservation present or after cancel restoring availability
suggestion: Add a test asserting fulfill_next/return_book is a no-op when a book has copies but zero reservations, or accept 0.99 as negligible

title: fulfill_next assumes borrow cannot fail post-return
evidence: catalog/reservations.py:49-53 removes the reservation then calls self.loans.borrow without a try/guard; safe today because return_book frees exactly one copy before fulfillment, but the invariant is implicit
suggestion: Optional: document the 'a copy just became available' precondition (already noted in docstring) or re-append the reservation if borrow raises
